title: AAR: Late-Down Defensive Intensity Clamp & Yardage Tightening (V2.9)
scope: Feature: Defensive intensity ramp on downs 4-6, yardage generation rebalance

rationale.item: Sixth downs were too rare. In a 200-game simulation, only 1.4% of drives ever reached 6th down, and 5th down appeared in just 4.3%. The entire late-down decision tree ... was effectively dead code. Teams converted first downs so easily that the 6-down system played like a 3-down sport.
Root Cause: Yards Per Play Too Generous. With runs averaging 13.3 yards and kick passes 15.5, teams were converting first downs in ~1.5 plays. The down counter rarely climbed past 3rd.

Why exponential? Small talent deltas should feel random... But when OVR 90 plays OVR 50, the defense should reliably squelch drives. Linear scaling treats a 3-point gap and a 40-point gap the same way (proportionally).

actions.description: Layer 1 — tightened yardage generation: run plays (_contest_run_yards) base_yards_multiplier 4.2 → 2.3, explosive rate 26% → 4.5%, explosive multiplier 1.8x → 1.33x, bust rate 4% → 7%; kick pass (simulate_kick_pass) base distances reduced ~25% and YAC reduced across sub-families, bomb caught-in-stride rate 35% → 22%.

Layer 2 — new _late_down_defensive_clamp(yards) method, applied at five resolution points (run plays, trick plays, lateral chains, kick pass completions, kick-lateral completions); base clamp chance 20%/35%/50% on downs 4/5/6, scaled exponentially by H2H talent gap (matchup_scale = clamp(0.15, 2.2, e^(gap_norm * 5.0))).
Removed dead _fourth_down_decision() (78 lines) from the 4-down era — never called; select_kick_decision() had fully replaced it.

risk_posture: Reduced yards at the source — no artificial barriers, just tighter natural mechanics.
This is the key design decision: the clamp isn't a flat dice roll — it respects the matchup.

validation_claims.claim: 200-game simulation (Washington U vs Southern Illinois): drives reaching 6th down 1.4% → 4.9% (+3.5pp, 3.5x); 5th down 4.3% → 8.3%; 4th down 18.1% → 22.7%.
validation_claims.check_method: Re-run a 200-game Washington U vs Southern Illinois batch and tabulate drives reaching each down.

validation_claims.claim: Yards per play after: Run 13.3 → 7.4; Kick Pass 15.5 → 13.3; Lateral Chain 8.9 → 9.8; Trick Play 4.1 → 4.2.
validation_claims.check_method: Re-run batch sim and compute average yards per play type.
Re-run batch sim and compute average combined score.

section_headers_original: AAR: Late-Down Defensive Intensity Clamp & Yardage Tightening (V2.9)
Root Cause: Yards Per Play Too Generous
unmapped_content:
Before yardage table: Run 13.3 avg, 18% explosive (20+ yds); Kick Pass 15.5, 28%; Lateral Chain 8.9, 9%. Kick pass base distance changes: Quick Kick 5-8 → 3-6; Territory 10-16 → 7-12; Bomb 22-30 → 18-25. YAC: Quick Kick floor 3-8 → 1-5; Territory floor 2-5 → 1-3; Bomb caught-in-stride YAC 10-20 base → 6-14 base.

Base clamp table: 4th 20% chance, reduction range -10% to +25% of original; 5th 35%, -15% to +20%; 6th 50% (coin flip), -20% to +15%. Matchup scaling: defensive rating = tackling(0.40) + awareness(0.35) + speed(0.25), fatigue-weighted; offensive rating = speed(0.30) + agility(0.25) + power(0.20) + awareness(0.25), fatigue-weighted; gap_norm = (avg_def - avg_off) / 100.0. Scaling examples: gap 0 → scale 1.00; gap +5 → 1.28 (4th 26%, 5th 45%, 6th 64%); gap +15 → 2.12 (4th 42%, 5th 60%, 6th 70% capped); gap -5 → 0.78 (16%/27%/39%); gap -15 → 0.47 (9%/16%/24%).

Down distribution of plays before/after: 1st 44.5% → 38.2%; 2nd 30.5% → 28.8%; 3rd 15.0% → 17.5%; 4th 7.8% → 10.8%; 5th 1.8% → 3.4%; 6th 0.4% → 1.2%.

What This Unlocks: select_kick_decision() down-5 logic (the "setup shot") fires 8.3% of drives; down-6 logic ("last chance — kick > punt > go for it") fires 4.9% of drives; GO_FOR_IT_MATRIX thresholds on 5th and 6th down are now meaningful decision points; Finnish baseball retention on snap kick misses creates real 5th→6th down sequences; lead management countermeasures (V2.7) that bias toward kick mode on late downs have material impact.

Files Changed table (engine/game_engine.py): lines 56-61 base_yards_multiplier 4.2 → 2.3; 7186-7203 run explosive rate changes; 8460-8474 kick pass base distances; 8806-8826 kick pass YAC; 4701-4750 new _late_down_defensive_clamp(); 7782,8056,8433,8849,9044 clamp wired into 5 resolution points; 4701 (old) removed dead _fourth_down_decision() (78 lines).

Commits: b070dbd Remove dead _fourth_down_decision() from 4-down era; fce32fc Tighten yardage generation to increase late-down frequency; af8ddc0 Lower run explosive rate to 4.5%; 45b7436 Add late-down defensive intensity clamp.
